Petition By Defendant California Institute Of Integral Studies For Order To Arbitrate And Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-14-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court's tentative ruling on DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSTITUTE OF INTEGRAL STUDIES' Petition For Order To Arbitrate And Stay Action Pending Arbitration is adopted as follows:

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration and to stay proceedings is granted.

[See word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.]

The Court signed the proposed order submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Order signed after hearing.

MOTION /Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order To Arbitrate And Stay Action Pending Arbitration By Defendant California Institute Of Integral Studies
Off Calendar Jan-02-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSTITUTE OF INTEGRAL STUDIES' Petition For Order To Arbitrate And Stay Action Pending Arbitration By Defendant California Institute Of Integral Studies.

Off calendar. First amended complaint filed 12/18/19.
